title: cardamine fallax
intro: Cardamine fallax, also known as false bugloss, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including colds and flu. Cardamine fallax can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support the immune system and overall well-being.
